title: Login with valid admin account
test_steps: 1. Open login page; 2. Enter admin email/password; 3. Submit form
expected_result: Redirect to dashboard and show welcome message

title: Register new customer account
test_steps: 1. Open register tab; 2. Fill valid profile; 3. Submit form
expected_result: Account created and redirect to login

title: Forgot password success flow
test_steps: 1. Enter email; 2. Answer security question; 3. Set new password
expected_result: Password updated and user can login with new password

title: Accept POST with valid CSRF token
test_steps: 1. Load login page; 2. Read csrf_token; 3. Submit POST /auth/login with token
expected_result: Request passes CSRF middleware and is processed

title: Create room with valid data
test_steps: 1. Open room page; 2. Open add room modal; 3. Submit valid data

title: Reject duplicate room number
test_steps: 1. Add room with existing room number; 2. Submit form
expected_result: Validation error is shown and room is not created

title: Create booking by admin
precondition: At least one customer and room exists
test_steps: 1. Open booking page; 2. Create booking with valid date range

title: Reject overlapping booking
precondition: Existing active booking for same room/date overlap
test_steps: 1. Attempt new booking overlapping existing dates
expected_result: System rejects request with overlap message

title: Booking workflow pending to checkout
test_steps: 1. Approve booking; 2. Check in; 3. Check out with payment method
expected_result: Statuses update correctly and payment record created

title: Create customer record
test_steps: 1. Open customer page; 2. Add customer with valid info

title: Export customer CSV
expected_result: CSV file downloads with expected columns

title: Filter report by date range
test_steps: 1. Select start and end date; 2. Click filter
expected_result: Metrics and chart data update by selected range
